exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 359 franchised hotels listed by state with entity names, hotel names, and addresses.

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest During 2024
exhibits.notes: Former franchisees and those with ownership changes in 2024.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited financial statements for Hilton Franchise Holding LLC. Includes auditor report (Cherry Bekaert, clean opinion), balance sheet, income statement, cash flows, notes 1-9. Years ended Dec 31 2024, 2023, 2022.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: Standard form Franchise Agreement with Addendum. Sample only, not for signature.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific amendments to the Franchise Agreement.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Form of development incentive note. Contingent liability that decreases linearly over term.

exhibits.name: Eforea Spa Amendment
exhibits.notes: Amendment for franchisees operating an eforea spa. Optional.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brand Amendment
exhibits.notes: Listed in TOC (p.8) but no standalone cover page found in the PDF scan. May be embedded within D-series exhibits or absent from this filing.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Form of personal/entity guaranty. Required guarantors sign this.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: Standard franchise application form.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: Governs OnQ and related technology systems. Runs concurrent with FA, auto-terminates with FA.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents - Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for the DoubleTree Brand Standards manual.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents - Eforea Spa Operating Standards
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for eforea spa operating standards manual.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents - Restaurant Brands
exhibits.notes: Listed in TOC (p.8) but no standalone cover page found. May be embedded or absent.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise regulatory agencies and designated agents for service.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: State-specific amendments to the FDD. Includes addenda for California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, South Dakota, Virginia, Washington, Wisconsin.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: Lists Restaurant Brands (Spencer's, Poppy's, Haley & Bear, The Comeback, Che Vita, Magnolia Smokehouse & Kitchen, Piebird). Most marks are pending registration, not yet federally registered.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Form lender comfort letters. Processing fee $3,500.

exhibits.name: State Effective Date
exhibits.notes: Lists effective dates for state registrations.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two detachable receipt copies for prospective franchisee.
